indicators.name: large glass ceiling panels
indicators.rationale: Large glass panels allow natural light to flood the space, potentially creating glare on computer screens.

indicators.name: curved white walls
indicators.rationale: Curved walls may create visual distractions and reduce the sense of enclosure, which can be distracting for focused work.

indicators.name: glass wall tiles
indicators.rationale: Glass wall tiles may reflect light and create glare on computer screens.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is moderately suitable for computer work (Solo). While the large glass ceiling panels allow natural light, they also introduce potential glare on computer screens. The curved white walls and glass wall tiles may create visual distractions and reduce the sense of enclosure, which can be distracting for focused work. Overall, the space is not ideal for solo computer work due to these factors.
